title: How Builders Grow
description: Build bigger, automate smarter, and bring your worlds to life with Create and endless building tools.
body:
How Builders Grow is a building-focused Create modpack designed for players who want to turn their worlds into living, thriving settlements.
With Create and its many add-ons at the core, you’ll craft machines, design factories, and automate construction. Complementary building mods like Macaw’s series, Rechiseled, Yuushya Townscape, and Dawn of Time give you endless block variety and architectural styles.

To bring worlds to life, the pack includes YUNG’s Better Structures, Terralith, Ecologics, and Amplified Nether, ensuring exploration feels fresh and inspiring. You’ll also find Farmer’s Delight & its add-ons, immersive decoration mods, and quality-of-life enhancements like JEI, Inventory Profiles Next, and Xaero’s maps.

Whether you’re designing a cozy village, sprawling city, or massive Create factory, this pack grows with your imagination.

✨ Features:

Huge selection of Create add-ons for automation & machines.

Expansive decoration & furniture mods for builders.

Enhanced world generation & structures.

Immersive ambience, shaders, and visual polish.

Optimized performance with Sodium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, and more.
